title: Repurposed Structures - All Bark, All Bite Compat
description: Houndmaster and Scavengers in RS Outposts!
body:
Add this datapack to the game to add compatibility between Repurposed Structures and All Bark, All Bite. You will find the new Houndmaster and their Scavengers in RS Overworld Outposts! The chest might contain a Whistle! 


- All Bark, All Bite mod can be obtained from here: https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/all-bark-all-bite

- Repurposed Structures mod can be obtained from here: https://modrinth.com/mod/repurposed-structures-forge

![https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/erj5nLtt/images/a4924505b1d343c24c7a6a96410b3de5fb2f8b3e.png](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/erj5nLtt/images/a4924505b1d343c24c7a6a96410b3de5fb2f8b3e.png)

**Note:** for people using CurseForge Launcher to download datapacks, use mods like Global Data & Resourcespacks to automatically load in downloaded datapacks without needing to manually move the datapacks from the resourcepack folder to the correct folders. 
https://modrinth.com/mod/globalpacks
